---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new processing algorithm or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / Use Case

<!-- What problem does this solve? What H&H workflow does it enable? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the feature. For new processing algorithms, include:
  - Expected input type (geometry HDF, plan HDF, project folder)
  - Expected output (vector layer, table, raster)
  - Which ras-commander classes or methods would provide the data
-->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered other approaches? Why is this the best path? -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Any of the following would be helpful:
  - Mockups or sketches of expected output
  - Links to relevant HEC-RAS documentation
  - Links to related ras-commander classes or example notebooks
  - Sample HDF file structure details
-->

<!-- Tip: Try describing this feature to an LLM agent and asking it to prototype the algorithm using an existing alg_*.py file as a template. You can include the draft in your PR. -->
